pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'enter "Tomato harvest - 50 lbs" as the Name' in step 2

Task description explicitly states 'change it to "Harvest"' in step 3. Verified as valid farmOS log type via https://farmos.org/guide/logs/ which states 'Harvest Logs are used to record harvests taken from an Asset'
Task description explicitly states 'enter "Harvested from greenhouse row 3"' in step 4

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Harvest log (a valid farmOS log type) with name 'Tomato harvest - 50 lbs', type 'Harvest', and notes 'Harvested from greenhouse row 3'. All metadata values are consistent with the task description and represent plausible farmOS harvest logging values.
